presets.label: Light (default)
presets.description: Sidebar stays white — today's look, unchanged.

presets.label: Charcoal Rail
presets.description: Neutral dark sidebar with your brand color on the active item.

presets.label: Midnight Rail
presets.description: Dark sidebar tinted toward your brand color, not neutral gray.

presets.label: Soft Tint
presets.description: A pale, brand-tinted sidebar — a step warmer than plain white.

presets.label: Deep Navy
presets.description: A fixed navy sidebar, independent of your brand color — a common corporate-admin look.
